gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM trans AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T4.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T3.birth_date) BETWEEN '1974' AND '1976' AND T3.gender = 'M' AND T1.amount > 4000 AND T1.k_symbol = 'SIPO'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) 
FROM client AS T2 
JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id 
JOIN "order" AS T1 ON T3.account_id = T1.account_id 
WHERE T2.gender = 'M' 
AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.birth_date) BETWEEN '1974' AND '1976' 
AND T1.k_symbol = 'SIPO' 
AND T1.amount > 4000
question: How many male customers who were born between 1974 and 1976 have made a payment on their home in excess of $4000?
